scripts.version:all:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
scripts.version:all:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
scripts.version:all:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
scripts.release:all:patch: pnpm lint && pnpm version:all:patch && git add apps && git commit -m 'chore: bump all version (patch)'
scripts.release:all:minor: pnpm lint && pnpm version:all:minor && git add apps && git commit -m 'chore: bump all version (minor)'
scripts.release:all:major: pnpm lint && pnpm version:all:major && git add apps && git commit -m 'chore: bump all version (major)'
scripts.release:server:patch: pnpm lint && pnpm version:server:patch && git add apps/server/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump server version (patch)'
scripts.release:server:minor: pnpm lint && pnpm version:server:minor && git add apps/server/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump server version (minor)'
scripts.release:server:major: pnpm lint && pnpm version:server:major && git add apps/server/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump server version (major)'
scripts.release:web:patch: pnpm lint && pnpm version:web:patch && git add apps/web/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump web version (patch)'
scripts.release:web:minor: pnpm lint && pnpm version:web:minor && git add apps/web/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump web version (minor)'
scripts.release:web:major: pnpm lint && pnpm version:web:major && git add apps/web/package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump web version (major)'
